mission.title: kagenti: ✨ Add MLflow integration for LLM trace observability
mission.description:
✨ Deploy MLflow alongside Phoenix to capture LLM traces from weather agent:

- Add MLflow Helm template (charts/kagenti-deps/templates/mlflow.yaml)
  - Deployment with PostgreSQL backend (shared with Phoenix)
  - Service and HTTPRoute/Route for UI access
  - Init container to create mlflow database

- Update OTEL collector to export traces to MLflow
  - Add otlphttp/mlflow exporter when mlflow.enabled
  - Add traces/mlflow pipeline using same filter as Phoenix

- Add E2E test for MLflow traces (

steps.title: Apply the configuration
steps.description:
Apply the following configuration to your cluster:
```yaml
k get pods -n kagenti-system
NAME                                          READY   STATUS             RESTARTS       AGE
http-istio-68cbb95cd6-jzt8k                   1/1     Running            0              2d2h
kagenti-backend-6b6497989c-gprcd              1/1     Running            0              32h
kagenti-controller-manager-575dbdb69b-gxxrm   1/1     Running            5 (132m ago)   2d2h
kagenti-ui-5c6c574fd8-ksjnl                   1/1     Running            0              32h
mcp
```

steps.title: Review the fix
steps.description: The fix was implemented in https://github.com/kagenti/agent-examples/pull/114. Review the changes to understand the solution.

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description: Confirm that the issue is resolved in your environment by testing the affected functionality.

resolution.summary:
## Summary

This adds opentelemetry-instrumentation-openai to emit spans with gen_ai.* attributes alongside the existing OpenInference spans.

The OTEL Collector transform processor converts GenAI semantic convention spans to OpenInference format before sending to MLflow, enabling trace visibility in both Phoenix and MLflow observability backends.

Changes:
- pyproject.toml: Add opentelemetry-instrumentation-openai dependency
- agent.py: Instrument OpenAI calls with GenAI semantic conventions

## Related issue(s)
https://github.com/kagenti/kagenti/pull/569
